utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists five items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these sections. Each section is fully specified with details and costs: health_coverage includes provider, policy details, coverage description, and monthly/annual costs; property_coverage likewise includes provider, policy number, coverage description, and costs; travel_coverage includes provider, policy number, coverage description, and costs; additional_services lists specific enhancements with costs and description; total_budget provides complete monthly and annual cost breakdown plus savings. All items are present and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main insurance components and some additional services. For health coverage, the provider is PrimeCare, which corresponds to the 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' for both physical and mental health in the ground-truth ratings. Each of these has a rating of 10. For property coverage, the provider is PrimeHome, corresponding to 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' with a rating of 10. For travel coverage, the provider is PrimeTravel, corresponding to 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' with a rating of 10. In the additional services, 'travel_assistance_service' refers to '24/7 Travel Assistance', rated 10; 'gym_membership_reimbursement' refers to 'Gym Membership Reimbursement', rated 6; and 'premium_membership' refers to 'Premium Insurance Membership', rated 10.
